title: Cave Dweller Remodel
description: Remodels and Textures the Cave Dweller
body:
Hello ladies and gentlemen and all in between! Recently there's been modded videos going around showcasing the fantastic cave dweller mod, a mod praised for making a horrifying experience by adding a single mob. Well in my opinion the model didn't look too great so I made one inspired by it and have turned it into a functioning resource pack! There'll be 2 versions of the resource pack, one with no eyes and one with eyes incase anyone has a preference. Look in the images tab to have a look at a couple of previews!

 

It is now compatible with Cave Dweller Evolved!


Link to Original Mod: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller

Link to Cave Dweller Evolved (Forge): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cave-dweller-evolved

Link to Cave Dweller Evolved (Fabric): https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dweller-evolved-(fabric)
